case_title: MOY, KAREN VS MR.BRICKEY, JAMES GEN. MANAGER et al

docket_entries.description: NOTE:J.DEBTOR(JAMES BRICKEY)TO TRY ROA CERT.COPIES 1ST BEFORE REQUESTING FOR MICROFILM COPIES.FANNIE ROA CERT.COPIES ACCEPTED BEFORE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MR.BRICKEY, JAMES GEN. MANAGER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $511.91 FILED BY MOY, KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT MR.BRICKEY, JAMES GEN. MANAGER EXECUPARK, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOY, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MR.BRICKEY, JAMES GEN. MANAGER EXECUPARK, INC. $511.91 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $511.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MR.BRICKEY, JAMES GEN. MANAGER EXECUPARK, INC.
